events.title: US Strikes Iranian-Flagged Tankers
events.desc: US forces fired on and disabled two Iranian-flagged tankers that attempted to violate the American blockade of Iran's ports. A US Navy F/A-18 Super Hornet disabled both tankers after firing precision munitions into their smokestacks, preventing the non-compliant ships from entering Iran.

events.title: Israel Strikes Beirut
events.desc: Israel stated it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in Beirut, marking the first strike of its kind in the capital since mid-April. This action escalates tensions between Israel and Hezbollah.

events.title: Israeli Settlers Raid West Bank
events.desc: Dozens of Israeli settlers stormed various areas of the West Bank, setting cars on fire and attacking Palestinians in acts of violence and unrest.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Fire in Gulf
events.desc: The U.S. and Iran appeared no closer to ending their war after exchanging fire in the Gulf amid a tenuous ceasefire. Recent days have seen significant flare-ups in fighting around the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Oil Slick Near Kharg Island
events.desc: Satellite images indicated an oil slick spreading off the coast of Iran's Kharg Island, a crucial oil export terminal for the country. This event raises concerns about environmental damage and potential disruptions to oil infrastructure.

events.title: US Strikes Additional Iranian Tanker
events.desc: The U.S. military struck a third empty Iranian-flagged oil tanker on Wednesday that it said was seeking to violate the ongoing U.S. blockade. Central Command stated that all three vessels are no longer transiting to Iran.

events.title: Libya's Largest Oil Refinery Halts Operations
events.desc: Libya's largest oil refinery in Zawiya has shut down as a precautionary measure due to nearby fighting, explosions, and gunfire. This halt in operations could impact regional energy supplies.

events.title: Drone and Missile Attacks on UAE
events.desc: The United Arab Emirates came under renewed attack on Friday, indicating ongoing kinetic actions in the Gulf region. Details on the specific targets and perpetrators are still emerging.

events.title: US Strikes on Iranian Oil Tankers Released
events.desc: The Pentagon released footage showing U.S. strikes on two Iranian oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz. This action is part of the ongoing maritime blockade and interdiction efforts.

events.title: Israeli Strikes on Lebanon
events.desc: Israel has increased its attacks across southern Lebanon. Al Jazeera reporter witnessed Israeli strikes on Tyre, indicating continued kinetic exchanges in the region.

events.title: Two Waves of Bombing in Minab Revealed
events.desc: New videos verified by Bellingcat show two waves of strikes hitting an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran. The strikes, which occurred in late February, resulted in casualties and destruction.

events.title: Destruction of Iranian Police Infrastructure
events.desc: Bellingcat has identified at least 80 police stations and Basij paramilitary infrastructure damaged or destroyed in the first three weeks of the war against Iran. This indicates a deliberate effort to degrade the regime's repressive capacity.
